Cash Flow Statement

Group Consolidated — FY 2025 Actuals & February 2026 | Indirect Method

Monthly EBITDA 2025 vs 2024 + Mar 2026
EBITDA | OCF | FCF | CAPEX — FY 2025 vs Mar 2026
CAPEX by Business Unit — FY 2025 vs Mar 2026 (USD)
February 2026 — Cash Movement Bridge (USD M)
Cash Flow Statement — FY 2025 & February 2026 (USD)
Data Sources & Notes:  (1) EBITDA & CAPEX from Financial Performance data (actual).   (2) FY 2025 Net Income from Dec 2025 Balance Sheet (actual).   (3) D&A = $10.6M FY2025 / $0.99M Mar 2026 from IS consolidation.   (4) FY 2025 OCF = Net Income + D&A (WC changes not available — Dec 2024 BS unavailable).   (5) Mar 2026 uses full indirect method with actual Dec 2025 → Mar 2026 Balance Sheet changes.   (6) Free Cash Flow = OCF − CAPEX.
